planning_basis.observed_pr: Completed TASK-0001, TASK-0003, TASK-0004, and TASK-0005 cycles measured from the canonical 72-event snapshot.
planning_basis.current_merged_formula: Full merged-tree recount: TASK-0012 baseline 1407 + TASK-0019 deltas runtime57 + IPC8 + lease6 = 1478. TASK-0019 adds 71 readable production lines, within its +90/1497 approved bounds.
planning_basis.strategy: Rolling-wave planning: only detailed tasks are executable; reserves are non-executable.
planning_basis.production_loc_definition: Count nonblank, non-comment executable-source lines in shipped, installed, or runtime/installation source: non-test .go and shipped .py, .sh, or .c. Excludes tests, planning/review documents, task/operator docs, workflows, declarative systemd/PAM/sudoers configuration, generated, and vendor.

production_sloc_budget_exceptions.TASK-0021: By explicit owner decision, installer, verifier, rollback, recovery, enrollment, rotation, and uninstall implementation is measured for readability but excluded from the 1500/1800 production SLOC budget. Any change to existing broker, CLI, PAM helper, IPC, lease, or audit runtime remains inside the budget.

measurement_rules.stage_pairing: same task, lap, stage, and attempt start-terminal pairs only
measurement_rules.active_wait: record active_ms and wait_ms as separate observations; never sum them to invent elapsed time
measurement_rules.retries: maximum propagated task-level retry counter across the complete cycle
measurement_rules.classifications: retain raw records with source_event_id and nullable superseded_by; effective values are only correction-validated unsuperseded records
measurement_rules.preflight: exclude stage=preflight from cycle and stage totals; preflight failure is not_started
measurement_rules.throughput: no SLOC/minute, average velocity, regression, or other fixed throughput assumption

tasks.title: production installer, rollback, and installation manuals
tasks.goal: Deliver a supported, transactional production installation path that verifies the official artifact, provisions the tool-neutral dedicated OS identity coding-agent and TOTP enrollment, integrates PAM with dedicated-identity full sudo gated by a fresh live lease on every invocation, installs and starts the broker, validates live behavior, and provides deterministic rollback, uninstall, administrator documentation, and an end-user manual.
activation_requirements: select and document an explicitly supported OS/version and PAM/sudo model
use coding-agent as the canonical production OS user and group name; keep product- or vendor-named identities confined to disposable fixtures
design a PAM integration that never blindly replaces the host sudo stack and preserves an independently tested root recovery path

define an explicit root full-sudo grant for coding-agent only, with normal, login, askpass, shell, and runas forms all routed through the Codex Authority PAM service and timestamp caching disabled; never claim the lease contains root effects after acquisition
define secret-safe enrollment, rotation, and root-owned seed creation without argv/environment/log disclosure

define the installer and verifier trust chain: pinned distribution, checksum/provenance verification before elevation, a copy-only fixed privileged step into root-owned non-writable staging, then a separate fixed root re-attest/extract/hash/execute step with fixed paths, argv, and environment
freeze installer, verifier, rollback, uninstall, ownership, and durable recovery-state paths plus a disposable reboot-capable destructive-test fixture
separate controlled error/signal automatic rollback from journaled recovery after SIGKILL, power loss, kernel failure, or reboot
measure installer-family SLOC for visibility and readability without applying the 1500/1800 production budget; preserve no-compression review and keep every existing runtime change inside the budget
approve TASK, PLAN, TASK-first QA_PLAN, and independent plan review
completion_requires: idempotent fail-closed install and verify flow for the supported platform
automatic rollback for every injected controlled error and catchable signal plus deterministic resume, rollback, or uninstall after every tested abrupt interruption and reboot point

independently runnable uninstall that restores captured shared-file pre-state, preserves compatible pre-existing identities, and leaves no installer-owned process, socket, identity, policy, seed, binary, unit, timestamp, temporary file, secret-bearing log, or recovery state

real disposable-host E2E covering clean enrollment, install, compatible identity reuse, UID/GID/name collision rejection, dedicated-identity full sudo for arbitrary root commands only during a fresh live authorization check, two uncached sudo calls, expiry, secret rotation with old secret/code rejection and old lease invalidation, broker stop/restart, controlled failed-install rollback, abrupt interruption and reboot recovery at every declared crash point, reinstall, and uninstall
artifact and installer provenance/checksum verification before privileged execution or writes
shared system journal and security audit remain unmodified and follow site retention policy while installer-owned temporary and secret-bearing logs are removed
administrator installation/recovery/uninstall manual and updated end-user manual that explicitly state root-acquired persistence can outlive the lease
independent REVIEW and QA PASS with secret-free evidence
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Disposable supported-platform VM or equivalent isolated host with snapshot/restore and scripted reboot/power-loss testing, console or other out-of-band root recovery, real systemd/PAM/sudo, network only for pinned artifact/provenance retrieval, and authority to create/remove the dedicated identity and exact declared files. Never develop or first-run the installer against a workstation or irreplaceable host.
tasks.sloc_budget_exception: Installer, verifier, rollback, recovery, enrollment, rotation, and uninstall implementation is measured but excluded from the 1500 target and 1800 hard production SLOC budget by explicit owner decision. Existing runtime/product changes remain budgeted.
exclusions: production OS user or group names tied to Codex, a specific coding tool, or a vendor
sudo grant for any identity other than coding-agent
global sudo defaults that affect other users
NOPASSWD or any route that bypasses the live PAM lease check
claiming that lease expiry reverses or contains effects produced after root acquisition
secret in argv, environment, shell history, logs, evidence, or repository
manual-only steps presented as a complete installer
silent mutation without captured pre-state and rollback
multi-distribution support before one platform is fully accepted
tasks.blocked_reason: The repository has no trusted production installer distribution path, supported-host dedicated-identity full-sudo PAM contract, enrollment/rotation tool, crash-recovery model, identity-lifecycle proof, or production uninstall proof. Scope and installer trust boundaries must be planned before executable work.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Do not enable DEV or mutate a live host until every activation requirement is approved. Stop and split if dedicated-only full sudo cannot be routed exclusively through a fresh live PAM lease check with timestamp caching disabled, or if out-of-band recovery, exact rollback, secret-safe enrollment, or crash recovery cannot be proven. Never weaken fail-closed behavior, hide installer size, compress code to meet a non-applicable budget, or move existing runtime changes outside the production SLOC guard.

rules.preflight: excluded from cycle and stage timing; preflight failure means not_started
rules.contingency: ceil(observed non-preflight time * 1.20); null remains null and SLOC receives no multiplier
rules.evidence: derive next-wave sizing from observed completed cycles and qualitative scope/risk
rules.sparse_evidence: do not assume fixed SLOC throughput, LOC velocity, average, or regression
rules.conversion: terminate TASK-0007, preserve unfinished TASK-0014, deliver replacements TASK-0013/TASK-0015, continue TASK-0008 through TASK-0009, close the planned TASK-0017 v1 blocker, then run TASK-0012's frozen post-TASK-0017 actual measurement; user-confirmed deferred-v2 TASK-0010/TASK-0011 contribute zero v1 SLOC and later milestones remain reserved
rules.remeasurement: TASK-0009 follows TASK-0008; planned TASK-0017 follows its merged product prerequisites; TASK-0012 follows TASK-0017 and freezes actual post-TASK-0017 evidence before any later wave
rules.corrections: for every correction, require nonempty annotations.corrects_event_id, target earlier in frozen file order, same task_id and lap_id, and target.sequence < correction.sequence; only then set superseded_by and derive effective values
rules.missing_values: retain non-derivable numeric values as null with a reason; zero requires explicit evidence
rules.correction_predicate: jq -s -e 'to_entries as $rows | all($rows[]; if .value.event == "correction" then . as $correction | any($rows[]; .key < $correction.key and .value.event_id == $correction.value.annotations.corrects_event_id and .value.task_id == $correction.value.task_id and .value.lap_id == $correction.value.lap_id and .value.sequence < $correction.value.sequence) else true end)' /home/ubuntu/git/agent-harness-work/lap30/events.jsonl

repository_checks.focused_rule: Each production Task runs its package-scoped command and additive fixture checks listed in its contract.

delivery_guardrails.production_sloc_counting: Count nonblank, non-comment executable-source lines within the production-LOC definition. For TASK-0021, measure and report installer, verifier, rollback, recovery, enrollment, rotation, and uninstall sources separately for readability but exclude them from the 1500/1800 budget; changes to existing runtime remain budgeted. TASK-0006 delta must remain exactly 0 and cumulative baseline exactly 751.
delivery_guardrails.no_compression: LOC caps never authorize semicolon or one-line packing, collapsed error handling, cryptic names, removal of security comments, test deletion, or combining functions solely to reduce LOC. REVIEW rejects these patterns; gofmt and idiomatic structure remain mandatory.
delivery_guardrails.projected_cap_trigger: The original 90% trigger forces explicit split/re-estimation and PLAN/QA_PLAN approval. After it fires, the approved per-Task absolute stop in projected_cap_trigger_sloc applies with explicit forecast headroom; target 1500 and hard 1800 are unchanged.
delivery_guardrails.candidate_cap_trigger: Candidate above target cap stops even below hard; crossing or forecasting above hard stops safely. Shed only in the exact listed order after approved replan.
delivery_guardrails.global_target_and_hard: 1500 is the mandatory-v1 planning target and 1800 the hard limit for budgeted production runtime. TASK-0021 installer-family sources are an explicit owner-approved exception: measure and review them without charging either cap. This exception does not cover changes to the existing broker, CLI, PAM helper, IPC, lease, or audit runtime.
mandatory_controls: dedicated socket ownership and PAM peer identity handoff
ordered_feature_shedding: automated canary executable; retain manual runbook/evidence
rich status/JSON UX; retain activate and immediate revoke
rich audit schema/correlation; retain correlation ID, actor, scope, result, and expiry
precomputed pack-size/history diagnostics; retain exact repo/ref/clean-tree validation and normal non-force rejection
remote-OID prefetch/race diagnostics; retain standard non-force rejection and generic failure
multi-distribution installer support; retain one explicitly supported platform with transactional install, rollback, and uninstall
move GitHub push to v2, leaving TOTP full-sudo authority as v1
delivery_guardrails.later_reserve: TASK-0019 and TASK-0020 completed the source-free attested artifact and manual canary/rollback at actual cumulative production SLOC 1478. User-required TASK-0021 now owns the remaining production installation, rollback/uninstall, and manuals goal and stays executable:false until its supported-platform and safety scope pass approval. Its installer-family size is measured but budget-excluded; existing runtime changes remain budgeted. The user-confirmed v1 push drop keeps TASK-0010/TASK-0011 in non-executable v2 reserve with zero v1 SLOC; no compression or silent reserve use.

acceptance_checks: The user-approved Disposition 2 atomically updates backlog, terminates TASK-0007, creates TASK-0013/TASK-0014, and propagates TASK-0008 through TASK-0009; this amendment adds planned TASK-0017 as the v1 blocker and places TASK-0012 after its frozen actual measurement without enabling push implementation.

TASK-0007 and unfinished TASK-0014 are non-executable with zero merged SLOC; TASK-0013 and TASK-0015 own the runtime and seed/daemon boundaries, TASK-0017 remains a planned v1 blocker until independent REVIEW/QA and merge, and later milestones remain reserved.

Index and every contract agree on identity, status/executable flag, dependency, increment, cumulative target/hard cap, paths, entrypoint, fixture/elevation, laps, exclusions, split rule, measurement lineage, replan reason, and reserve eligibility; TASK-0010/TASK-0011 remain user-confirmed deferred-v2 executable:false zero-v1-SLOC reserves, TASK-0017 metadata is exact, and TASK-0012 depends on TASK-0017 and freezes post-TASK-0017 actual measurement.
TASK-0006 production SLOC delta is exactly 0 and cumulative measured baseline remains exactly 751.
TASK-0009 and TASK-0012 apply the deterministic same-task/same-lap/earlier-file/smaller-sequence correction predicate before effective values.
Every independent REVIEW and QA runs the focused checks plus GOCACHE="$(mktemp -d)" go test ./..., gofmt, git diff --check, and jq JSON validation as applicable.

TASK-0017's approved +145 / projected 1398 remeasurement is not an implementation or E2E result; zero further production allowance, target/hard reserves (1500/1800), mandatory controls, exact shedding order, and no-compression rules remain binding.

TASK-0021 remains planned and executable:false until its supported platform, coding-agent-only full-sudo PAM integration with uncached live checks, secret-safe enrollment, destructive fixture, rollback/uninstall design, and installer-family measurement plan pass independent approval; installer-family sources are outside the 1500/1800 budget while existing runtime changes remain inside it.

human_gate_evidence.review_checklist: Record independent contract/index comparison, fixture and focused/full checks, correction predicate, production-SLOC count, caps/reserves, and no-compression/guardrail compliance.
human_gate_evidence.qa_checklist: Independently repeat the focused/full checks, canonical measurement and correction arithmetic, exact seven-file scope, contract/index mapping, dependency walk, reserve gate, and PASS/FAIL classification.
